transcript.q:
Welcome, and thank you so much for coming in today. It's great to have you here. I hope you found the office without too much trouble.

Before we dive in, I just want to say that this is meant to be a relaxed conversation. We want to get to know you and understand your background, so please feel free to take your time with your answers.

So let's start with something straightforward. Can you tell me a little bit about yourself and what drew you to software engineering as a career?
